name: sim2field-build
description: SIM2FIELD curriculum build pipeline: KaTeX build-time pre-render + drift guard + authored-typography guard. The math source of truth is the TeX in each build/<asset>-src.html; the shipped <asset>.html is a generated, self-contained artifact that needs no runtime KaTeX.

scripts.build: for f in *-src.html; do node prerender.js "$f" "${OUT_DIR:-..}/${f%-src.html}.html"; done
scripts.verify: node verify-build.js && node verify-typography.js && node verify-figures.js
scripts.test: node verify-build.js && node verify-typography.js && node verify-figures.js
